data.title: FIFA Partners With Konami For eFootball FIFAe World Cup Revival
data.description: FIFA teams up with Konami for the FIFAe World Cup, featuring eFootball in a global esports event. Qualifying starts today.

data.title: Critical Insights From Equitable Hldgs Analyst Ratings: What You Need To Know
What Analysts Are Saying About Johnson & Johnson Stock
Josh Brown Flags 'Monster' Call Buying In Nvidia Up To $190 Strike: 'This Is Not Retail Money'
data.description: Massive call-buying activity in Nvidia Corp stock going out to 2025 has caught the attention of Ritholtz Wealth Management's Josh Brown — and for good reason: someone's betting that Nvidia could approach $190 within six months.

data.title: MercadoLibre Poised For 30% Upside As Gross Merchandise Value And Payment Volume Surge, Says Goldman Sachs
data.description: MercadoLibre is set to report its Q3 2024 earnings in late October or early November. Analysts predict an adjusted EPS of $10.55 and revenues of $5.25 billion, driven by robust gross merchandise value growth in Brazil and Mexico. Goldman Sachs maintains a Buy rating with a price target of $2,620.
